query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_resolutions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entity_id INT NOT NULL,
  meeting_id INT,
  resolution_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  full_text TEXT,
  resolution_type ENUM('ordinary', 'special', 'unanimous', 'written_consent') DEFAULT 'ordinary',
  proposed_by INT,
  seconded_by INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'proposed', 'voting', 'passed', 'failed', 'tabled', 'withdrawn') DEFAULT 'draft',
  votes_for INT DEFAULT 0,
  votes_against INT DEFAULT 0,
  votes_abstain INT DEFAULT 0,
  votes_required INT DEFAULT 0,
  voting_deadline DATETIME,
  passed_at TIMESTAMP,
  effective_date DATE,
  document_url TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (meeting_id) REFERENCES board_meetings(id)
);

  proposed_by INT,
  seconded_by INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'proposed', 'voting', 'passed', 'failed', 'tabled', 'withdrawn') DEFAULT 'draft',
  votes_for INT DEFAULT 0,
  votes_against INT DEFAULT 0,
  votes_abstain INT DEFAULT 0,
  votes_required INT DEFAULT 0,
  voting_deadline DATETIME,
  passed_at TIMESTAMP,
  effective_date DATE,
  document_url TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (meeting_id) REFERENCES board_meetings(id)
);
